title: Al Hamalah Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Al Hamalah with a Z-Score of +3.46. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Al Hamalah has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperature is causing a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 11.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 49% and the wind speed is 14.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
